cloud-asset-discovery.label: Cloud Asset Discovery
content: * Handled the maintenance and feature addition of a cloud asset discovery system used to manage technology lifecycle and configuration drift. * Improved scalability by switching from Azure Logic Apps to Function Aps with full Python capability.

chaos-engineering.label: Chaos Engineering
content: * Led the effort to enable Chaos Studio for Azure and built chaos testing scripts, documentation/run books. * Ensured platform stability, availability, and resiliency through comprehensive planning and cross-functional team engagement.

cloud-platform-engineering.label: Cloud Platform Engineering
content: * Led the development of terraform modules for individual service engineers to deploy policies directly from their pipeline. * Ensured continuous compliance through automation of test scripts using github copilot agents.

cloud-security-engineering.label: Cloud Security Engineering
content: * Led the effort to establish a continuous compliance environment through policy deployment and CI/CD pipelines. * Improved productivity by enabling individual service engineers to deploy policies directly from their pipeline.

cloud-integrated-cicd.label: Cloud Integrated CI/CD
content: * Developed a new approach for service engineers to deploy policies directly from their pipeline, leveraging terraform modules and GitHub copilot agents. * Enhanced productivity and ensured continuous compliance through automated testing.
